combined_text: What is the difference between a script, a screenplay, and a teleplay? What is the difference between a script, a screenplay, and a teleplay?“Script” is the most general of the three terms, and is not reserved for any specific type of media. “Screenplay” specifically refers to the script of a film or television program. “Teleplay” is even more specific, and is only use
